title: Displaced During Salwa Judum, 31,000 Bastar Tribals Shun Chhattisgarh Govt’s ‘Homecoming’ Offer
description: The representatives of these displaced families made their intentions clear to the Bastar administration, which has initiated the process to rehabilitate them in their native villages, at a high-level official meeting, held at district headquarters of Dantewada in south Bastar on Wednesday.
